content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Candies and Two Sisters". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1335/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains two integers n and k. The second line contains n integers representing the array of candies.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print YES if it is possible to divide the candies between the two sisters, otherwise print NO.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the candies in descending order and try to divide them between the two sisters.
